query: NVIDIA Corporation current Chief Executive Officer CEO name
answer: Jensen Huang is the current Chief Executive Officer of NVIDIA Corporation, having founded the company in 1993 and serving as its president and CEO. He is also a member of the board of directors.

results.title: Nvidia Org Chart: 36 Leaders in Charge Under CEO Jensen Huang
results.snippet: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is known for having more direct reports than other tech leaders. An internal list shows these 36 reports.
